title: AN脗聽ACT脗聽CREATING BARANGAYS ACMAC-MARIANO BADELLES SR., SAN ROQUE, LUINAB, UPPER HINAPLANON, AND UBALDO LAYA, ALL IN THE CITY OF ILIGAN

chunks.text:
118 OG No. 32, 8972 (August 8, 2022)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11902, July 28, 2022 ]

AN脗 ACT脗 CREATING BARANGAYS ACMAC-MARIANO BADELLES SR., SAN ROQUE, LUINAB, UPPER HINAPLANON, AND UBALDO LAYA, ALL IN THE CITY OF ILIGAN

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Creation of Barangays Acmac-Mariano Badelles Sr., San Roque, Luinab, Upper Hinaplanon, and Ubaldo Laya

. 芒聙聰 There shall be created five (5) barangays in the City of Iligan to be known as Barangay Acmac-Mariano Badelles Sr., Barangay San Roque, Barangay Luinab, Barangay Upper Hinaplanon, and Barangay Ubaldo Laya.

SECTION 3.

Conduct and Supervision of Plebiscite

. 芒聙聰 The plebiscite conducted and supervised by the Commission on Elections pursuant to Iligan City Ordinance Numbered 1934 dated February 5, 1991 for the creation of Barangay Luinab, 1945 dated March 20, 1991 for the creation of Barangay Upper Hinaplanon, 1931, 1932 and 1946 all dated duly 22, 1991 for the creation of Barangay Acmac-Mariano Badelles Sr., Barangay San Roque and Barangay Ubaldo Laya respectively, which ratified the creation of said barangays as proclaimed by the Plebiscite Board of Canvassers shall serve as substantial compliance with the plebiscite requirement under Section 10 of Republic Act No. 7160,

otherwise known as the Local Government Code of 1991, as amended.

SECTION 4.

Incumbent Barangay Officials

. 芒聙聰 The incumbent barangay officials of Barangays Acmac-Mariano Badelles Sr., San Roque, Luinab, Upper Hinaplanon, and Ubaldo Laya shall continue to hold office until such time that their successors have been duly elected and qualified.

SECTION 5.

Public Infrastructure and Facilities

. 芒聙聰 All existing public infrastructure and facilities for public use within the territorial boundaries of the newly-created barangays shall continue to be owned and administered by them.

SECTION 6.

Internal Revenue Allotment (IRA) Shares

. 芒聙聰 Barangays Acmac-Mariano Badelles Sr., San Roque, Luinab, Upper Hinaplanon, and Ubaldo Laya shall be entitled to Internal Revenue Allotment (IRA) shares pursuant to Section 285 of Republic Act No. 7160,

otherwise known as the

Local Government Code of 1991

, as amended.

SECTION 7.

Repealing Clause

. 芒聙聰 All laws, decrees, executive orders, rules and regulations contrary to or inconsistent with any provision of this Act are hereby repealed or amended accordingly.

SECTION 8.

Effectivity

. 芒聙聰 This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

LORD ALAN JAY Q. VELASCO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives on November 25, 2020, amended by the Senate of the Philippines on May 30, 2022, and which amendments were concurred in by the House of Representatives on June 1, 2022

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

MARK LLANDRO L. MENDOZA

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: Lapsed into law on JUL 28 2022 without the signature of the President, in accordance with Article VI Section 27 (1) of the Constitution.

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
